{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/clay.png
|block_health=6.5
|tool=[[Shover]]
|rotation=stairs
}}

Clay is a soil that hosts dew grass.

== Obtaining ==
Clay can be found in some wet biomes, as well as mushroom caves.
Breaking dew grass will drop clay blocks.

== Usage ==
8 clay and 1 [[coal]] can be crafted into 8 [[terracotta]].

== History ==

* [[0.2.0]] -
** Clay is now the soil for dew grass.
** Texture was changed. Previous texture was: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.1.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/clay.png
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Soil]]
